summary.zh: 结合未闭环、工具失败、纠偏和验证语言，评估一次任务的闭环质量。
summary.en: Scores task closure quality from open loops, tool failures, corrections, and verification language.

when_to_use.zh: 当需要把多个 session 信号汇总成任务成功、延后或需要复盘的判断时使用。
when_to_use.en: Use this to summarize multiple session signals into success, delay, or review-needed judgment.

limitations.zh: 纯文本闭环评分无法替代真实运行验证，外部状态变化需要由其他 factor 补充。
limitations.en: Text-only closure scoring cannot replace real execution checks; external state changes need other factors.

privacy.zh: 只读取标准化 SessionEnvelope 的事件摘要和引用，不保存 raw private content。
privacy.en: Reads only standardized SessionEnvelope event summaries and references, and does not store raw private content.
